name: immersphere-production-orchestrator
description: Semi-automatic production orchestrator for Immersphere CRM — generates AURUM + Rubik files, PR plans, and Response Bundles.

scripts.build: node --check src/schemas.ts && node --check src/security.ts && node --check src/logger.ts && node --check src/validateProductionPackage.ts && node --check src/buildDryRunPlan.ts && node --check src/fileGenerators.ts && node --check src/buildPrAutomationPlan.ts && node --check src/server.ts && node --check src/index.ts
